2275870.name: EscapeGame TimelessRoom
2275870.description:
It is a puzzle-solving game where you solve a mystery with one-click operation, unlock a closed door, and escape from a vast and mysterious world.
A unique view of the world with the theme of space, mysterious graphics, and more than 20 BGM are recorded.
If you clear to the end, you may get a glimpse of the big mystery of the world.

Let's get out of this world by solving the items and gimmicks scattered in the mysterious world.


【Features】
-Easy to start for first players
-The world of mysterious art and sound.
-Auto-save function
-Hints function.

【How to play】
・Let's tap the part of the screen that interests you.
・Tap the right and left buttons to swipe the window.
・To check the hint from menu window.
・Light up the item. tap the gimmick, then you can use it.

Program,Sound KensukeHorikosshi
Graphic Taniguchi

If you like this game, please play other games!
2275870.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 韩语
